questionHtml: Suggest with a reason which system best reproduces the conditions of the natural environment.
markschemeHtml:
a. horizontal flow/«figure» B because it is larger
OR
horizontal flow/«figure» B contains more/several plants ✔

b. horizontal flow/«figure» B because it works by natural flow
OR
horizontal flow/«figure» B because it works without a pump ✔ Do not accept river instead of flow.

meta.title: Suggest with a reason which system best reproduces the conditions of the natural environment.
breadcrumbLabels: D4.2.4. Use of a model to investigate the effect of variables on ecosystem stability
